summary: iOS crash fix verification for MatchDetailSheet component. Backend APIs all working correctly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend login automation via Playwright continues to have issues with React Native Web form submission. Code review confirms the iOS crash fix is properly implemented.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web login form doesn't respond to Playwright click/Enter events. Form fills correctly but SIGN IN button click doesn't trigger login. This is a known limitation with React Native Web and Playwright automation.

critical_code_review_comments: iOS crash fix VERIFIED: useTranslation() removed from all child components (EventsList, EventRow, StatsComparison, LineupsView)
Null safety VERIFIED: Optional chaining and fallback values used throughout (e.g., ev?.team_name || '', m?.home_goals !== null && m?.home_goals !== undefined)
Strict equality VERIFIED: Using === and !== instead of loose equality operators
Array safety VERIFIED: Array.isArray() checks before accessing array methods
Empty state handling VERIFIED: Shows 'Nessun evento disponibile', 'Statistiche non disponibili', 'Formazioni non disponibili' for empty data

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully test due to Playwright/React Native Web login limitation

context_for_next_testing_agent: iOS crash fix verified via code review and backend API testing. Login automation via Playwright doesn't work with React Native Web - recommend using token injection via localStorage (keys: access_token, refresh_token, user) but note that tokens expire quickly. Backend APIs all working correctly.

backend_apis.Auth required: PASSED - All endpoints return 401/403 without token

backend_apis.Lineups data structure: PASSED - Lineups have team_name, starters, substitutes arrays

code_review_ios_crash_fix.useTranslation removed from children: VERIFIED - EventsList, EventRow, StatsComparison, LineupsView use hardcoded Italian strings
code_review_ios_crash_fix.Null safety for scores: VERIFIED - homeGoals !== null && homeGoals !== undefined checks
code_review_ios_crash_fix.Null safety for halftime: VERIFIED - halftime?.home, halftime?.away with null checks

ios_crash_fix_verification.original_issue: iOS crash when clicking on match results in Statistics screen's Risultati tab
root_causes_fixed: useTranslation() hooks in child components (EventsList, EventRow, StatsComparison, LineupsView) - REMOVED
Loose equality operators (!=) that trigger abstractEqualityTest crashes - REPLACED with strict equality (===, !==)
No null safety for match data with null values (home_goals, away_goals, halftime, events, statistics, lineups) - ADDED optional chaining and fallback values
ios_crash_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Code review confirms all fixes are properly implemented
